objective: Bundle compatible work safely by lane so HX2 can build faster without weakening verification.

lanes.ownership: Architecture boundaries, dependency map, hot-file risk, acceptance criteria.
Sprint manifest, sequencing, task breakdown, rollback notes.
Patch execution using structured mutation mode and file ownership boundaries.
Guard coverage, smoke checks, strict retrieval trust, benchmark, failure triage.
Git status, diff review, commit grouping, push decision, deploy readiness.
Closeout snapshot, runbook updates, handoff notes.

hot_files.reason: Package script wiring must be release-managed.
Quick verify changes affect release safety gates.
Retrieval runtime changes require strict retrieval trust.

release_policy: No commit unless required lane verification passes.
No push unless working tree is reviewed and expected files are staged.
No production deploy without explicit approval.
handoff_rules: Planner declares file ownership before patching.
QA verifies before Release Manager commits.
Docs lane closes the phase after repo lock.
